name: de.ftedv.nousa11z
description: Homey app for the NOUS A11Z TS011F power strip revision _TZ3210_6cmeijtd.

scripts.validate: npm run assets && homey app validate
scripts.validate:publish: npm run assets && homey app validate --level publish
scripts.run: npm run assets && homey app run
scripts.build: npm run assets && homey app build
